title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at Cambridge University use AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate discovery of bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The approach compresses analysis that previously took years into minutes to address antimicrobial resistance.
